title: EP: UNION injection payload in email should leak or alter query results

test_steps:
Enter the injection payload '' UNION SELECT NULL, username, password FROM users--' into the email field
Submit the form/request

expected_result: The application exhibits SQL injection symptoms: additional data displayed (e.g., username/password) or error messages indicating query modification.
